disambiguated.context: While I was sitting on a park bench yesterday, a person named Ayanna Banks came up to me, and then about five minutes later another person named Shannon Larson came up. Ayanna Banks was just lost, but the second one was looking to buy meth!
disambiguated.question: Who was trying to buy drugs?
